rationale: Supports reproducibility inspection and does not contain personal health values.
Supports transparent interpretation and release boundaries.
Contains coarsened/minimised tables without withheld high-resolution temporal details or withheld source filenames.
Contains full timestamped processed tables and potentially linkable context.
Contains raw source files and nested archives.
Device-generated health reports are sensitive withheld source media.
Audio can contain media leakage or ambient information.
Granular time can support routine reconstruction.
Contextual notes can expose behaviour or identity.
